name: rate_type_with_matched_column_params
description: Verify that play-level params are applied to denominator CTE when rate_type_column_params is present
expected_query: with "t8805e05b24954ea86f32257061e036a9" as materialized (select "nfl_plays"."psr_pid" as "pid", SUM(CASE WHEN psr_pid IS NOT NULL AND (sk IS NULL OR sk = false) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as rate_type_total_count from "nfl_plays" where not "play_type" = 'NOPL' and "nfl_plays"."targeted_receiver_separation" in ('OPEN', 'WIDE_OPEN') and "nfl_plays"."year" in (2023) group by "nfl_plays"."psr_pid"), "tbddb4e04f43a993bad23f091bf5c4c47" as materialized (select COALESCE(trg_pid) as pid, SUM(CASE WHEN trg_pid IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as trg_from_plays from "nfl_plays" where not "play_type" = 'NOPL' and "nfl_plays"."nfl_week_id" in ('2023_PRE_WEEK_1', '2023_PRE_WEEK_2', '2023_PRE_WEEK_3', '2023_PRE_WEEK_4', '2023_REG_WEEK_1', '2023_REG_WEEK_2', '2023_REG_WEEK_3', '2023_REG_WEEK_4', '2023_REG_WEEK_5', '2023_REG_WEEK_6', '2023_REG_WEEK_7', '2023_REG_WEEK_8', '2023_REG_WEEK_9', '2023_REG_WEEK_10', '2023_REG_WEEK_11', '2023_REG_WEEK_12', '2023_REG_WEEK_13', '2023_REG_WEEK_14', '2023_REG_WEEK_15', '2023_REG_WEEK_16', '2023_REG_WEEK_17', '2023_REG_WEEK_18', '2023_POST_WEEK_1', '2023_POST_WEEK_2', '2023_POST_WEEK_3', '2023_POST_WEEK_4') and "nfl_plays"."year" in (2023) and "nfl_plays"."targeted_receiver_separation" in ('OPEN', 'WIDE_OPEN') and "nfl_plays"."year" in (2023) group by COALESCE(trg_pid)) select "player"."pid", CAST(tbddb4e04f43a993bad23f091bf5c4c47.trg_from_plays AS DECIMAL) / NULLIF(CAST(t8805e05b24954ea86f32257061e036a9.rate_type_total_count AS DECIMAL), 0) AS "trg_from_plays_0", "player"."pos" from "player" left join "t8805e05b24954ea86f32257061e036a9" on "t8805e05b24954ea86f32257061e036a9"."pid" = "player"."pid" left join "tbddb4e04f43a993bad23f091bf5c4c47" on "tbddb4e04f43a993bad23f091bf5c4c47"."pid" = "player"."pid" group by "tbddb4e04f43a993bad23f091bf5c4c47"."trg_from_plays", t8805e05b24954ea86f32257061e036a9.rate_type_total_count, "player"."pid", "player"."lname", "player"."fname", "player"."pos" order by 2 DESC NULLS LAST, "player"."pid" asc limit 500
